ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "problem_text" TEXT /* Text of the problem */,
  "true_answer" INTEGER /* Correct answer to the problem */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the problem */,
  "difficulty" REAL /* Difficulty level of the problem (0-1) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* The subject or topic the problem belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the problem */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the problem was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the problem */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the problem was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the problem (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student response */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the response */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the response is for */,
  "answer" INTEGER /* Answer given by the student */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the teacher on the student's response */,
  "grade" REAL /* The grade or score given to the response */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who reviewed the response */,
  "reviewed_date" TEXT /* Date the response was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the institution */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the student (e.g., active, inactive, graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who teaches the class */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the class is part of */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the class */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the class */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the class is held */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the class (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the teacher belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the teacher */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the teacher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the teacher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the teacher was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the teacher (e.g., active, inactive, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the course belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the course (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* The password for the user account (hashed and salted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
